title: ユキノ先生の雪道講座

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Now the ground's all slippery, and—wh-whoa!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
A-are you okay? It's bett'r to shuffle your feet
when you're walk'n across snowy roads.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
S'right! You won't topple ov'r if you take short
steps, slide your feet, and lean forw'rd.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Wow, I had no idea... It's practically the opposite
of how models walk down the runway.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
So be my teacher, okay? When you say "lean
forward," do you mean like this?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, don't overreact. Come on, teach me.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Umm... Uh... Go ahead and bend your knees a
t'nsy bit more... uh, if you please.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Ah, move your center of gravity forw'rd. Oth'rwise
you'll slip backwards and smack your head.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
You'll be fine. Focus on moving forw'rd if you fall.
That way, ya won't hurt yourself too badly.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Stay alert, and icy roads are noth'n to fear.
Walking on 'em can even help train your low'r
body!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, interesting... You're so dependable,
Teacher.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Y-y-you really mean that? If it helps you out, you
can ask me 'bout this kinda stuff whenev'r you
fancy!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Today's my opportunity to repay you for always
teach'n me about city life!
